mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.is_stock, t0.filing_court_name, t0.judge_name, t0.judge_phone, t0.filling_date, t0.litigation_type, t0.register_type, t0.register_id, t0.filling_code, t0.judge_date, t0.court_session_date, t0.litigation_id, t0.project_id, t0.law_firm_id, t0.remarks, t0.flow_state, t0.is_deleted
